titleStmt.title: SII 8.440: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 440. (A.R. No. 152 of 1903). INSIDE THE SUBRAHMANYA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉacakra vattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekara
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu taimmātam 10 4 tiyati tirumalaināṭṭut tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟat tuṭaiyār tiruk
koṭuṅkuṉṟamuṭaiyanāyiṉār koyil tevarkaṉmi śrīmaheśva rak kaṇkāṇiceyvār cikāriyañceyvār
koyiṟkaṇakkarom keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭaruviyūrāṉa kulacekarapaṭṭiṉattuk ko
llūruṭaiyā ṉuyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ mayileṟumperumāḷāṉa nayapālaṟkup piṭipāṭupaṇṇikku
ṭutta paricāvatu . Ikkoyilukku tiruvitiyi leḻuntaruḷa Iḷaiyapiḷḷaiyā ri
llāmaiyāl piḷḷaiyāraiyum nāccimāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvittut tāmam Amutu
paṭi cāttuppaṭi tirunāḷtevai yuḷḷiṭṭaṉavum ciripaṇṭārattile ce
luttukiṟomeṉṟu Ivaṟku piṭipāṭu muṉpe kuṭuttu Ivarum Iḷaiyapiḷḷai
yār Aḻakiyaperumāḷaiyum nāccimāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷuvittukkoṇṭu
ṭayum paṇṇuvikkaiyil Amutupaṭiyum muṉpu taḷa
ttumpaṭi cipaṇṭārattukku tirumutal taraveṇumeṉṟu co
pakkale cipaṇṭārattukku Irunūṟu paṇam Oṭukkuvittuk
ṭu Innāḷmutal tirunāvukkaracu nāḻiyāl nāḷ Oṉṟukku nā
ciyuṅ kaṟiyamutu viñcaṉamum tiruviḷakkum cāttuppaṭiyum ka
tāmamum tiruvitiyil Eḻuntaruḷummiṭattu Āṟāntirunāḷu
ḻicciyum Eḻuntaruḷuvikkavum Ippaṭi Innāḷmutal can
tavaṟ celuttuvomāka Ippaṭikku Iḷaiyapiḷḷaiyār ko
yilile kalveṭṭikkoḷvārāka Ippaṭi cammatittu piṭipāṭu
paṇṇikkuṭuttom kollūruṭaiyā ṉuyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ mayi
leṟumperumāḷāṉa nayapālaṟku Uṭaiyār tirukkoṭuṅkuṉṟamu
ṭaiy(ā) nāyaṉār koyil tevakaṉmi cimākecurak kaṇkāṇi cikāriyañ
ceyvār cikoyilkkaṇakkarom . Ippaṭikku śrīmā heśva rak(k) kaṇ
kāṇi kūttapperumāḷ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku periyatirukkūṭṭa piramā
tarāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku cikāriyam tirucciṟṟampalap pallavatarai
yaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku māṭāpattiyam tirumalaiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .
Ippaṇam Irunūṟu Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭamaikku koyiṟkaṇakku
Āṇṭapiḷḷai Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.440 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
